subject: FW:  Nadia's counter
body:
From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Friday, May 02, 2008 8:38 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Nadia's counter

 

 

Lesley,

Please forward this on to Jeffrey.  Thanks.

 

Susana met with Nadia at the apartment yesterday and thinks the island
looks fine. Nadia had no problem with the unit, it was Anthony Barrett
who did not like it. It was built as designed and approved. She was
originally hesitant about the color, but the grey used was the one
selected by the designer Jeffrey brought on board to be the color
expert. The grey does read a bit brown-green, but she thinks it is ok.

 

Daniel Estes

destes@zeffdesign.com

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x206

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com]
Sent: Friday, May 02, 2008 8:38 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Nadia's counter

 

 

Lesley,

Please forward this on to Jeffrey.  Thanks.

 

Susana met with Nadia at the apartment yesterday and thinks the island looks fine. Nadia had no problem with the unit, it was Anthony Barrett who did not like it. It was built as designed and approved. She was originally hesitant about the color, but the grey used was the one selected by the designer Jeffrey brought on board to be the color expert. The grey does read a bit brown-green, but she thinks it is ok.

 

Daniel Estes
